positive: A mystical nocturnal forest landscape viewed from an overhead perspective, showing a central cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main subject is a stylized, highly contrasting silhouette of interwoven tree branches and delicate glowing butterflies. The color palette must be limited to deep sapphire blues, electric turquoise, deep purples, and accents of neon lime green for the luminescence. Use a vaporwave-meets-art-deco aesthetic, featuring clean geometric patterns integrated into the natural elements. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed for seamless wrapping around an apparel item. Cinematic lighting, extreme depth of field, high contrast, vector graphic precision, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, amateur, noise, grain, gradient shift
